entries.title: Catechetical Lecture 9: On the Words, Maker of Heaven and Earth, and of All Things Visible and Invisible
entries.excerpt: On the Words, Maker of Heaven and Earth, and of All Things Visible and Invisible. Job 38:2-3 Who is this that hides counsel from Me, and keeps words in his heart, and thinks to hide them from Me ? To look upon God with eyes of flesh is impossible: for the incorporeal cannot be subject to bodily sight: and the Only begotten Son of God Himself has testified, saying, No man has seen God at any time. John 1:18 For if according to that which is written in Ezekiel any one should understand that Ezekiel saw Him, yet what says the Scripture? He saw the likeness of the glory of the Lord Ezekiel 1:28;…
